goal: Capture a reviewable witness for a nontrivial run and distill it into a compost note without severing provenance.

steps.intent: Bound the run and confirm that a witness artifact is required.
steps.observation: The run crosses memory and review boundaries, so a witness trace is in scope.

steps.intent: Inspect the source surfaces needed for the bounded run.
steps.observation: The required docs and registry surfaces were inspected without exposing sensitive content.

steps.intent: Record the externally visible effect of the bounded route.
steps.state_delta: Produced witness_trace_json and witness_summary_md for later memo writeback and compost distillation.

steps.intent: Stop promotion at note level unless provenance and limits remain explicit.
steps.observation: The route is ready for a compost note and a principle candidate only under explicit review.

summary_output.summary: The run bounded a witness-producing route, preserved tool visibility and one explicit state delta, and ended with a public-safe summary suitable for memo writeback and compost note creation.
human_checks: Inspect whether any external effect lacked a state_delta note.
Confirm the compost promotion stops at note level if provenance becomes unclear.
